---
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    css: styles.css
---

::: {style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 40px;"}
# Rāg Bāhār
:::


## Songs in this collection


- [Āye ritu pati](chapters/aye_ritu_pati.qmd)

- [Āju bahata sugandha](chapters/aju_bahata_sugandha.qmd)

- [Manamatha tana dahe](chapters/manamatha_tana_dahe.qmd)

- [Phuli bana ghana](chapters/phuli_bana_ghana.qmd)
